text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR> .<FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1) Replaced garbled unicode sequences (√§, √º, √∫, √©, √ü, √∂, √Æ, √≤) with correct characters (ä, ü, u, é, ie, ö, à, °). 2) Changed the mismatched closing tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE> in the Corpus Juris Civilis entry so that the opening <PRICE> was replaced by <PRIZE> for consistency with other entries. 3) Fixed the final BIBL entry where <PRIZE> was closed by </PRICE>; unified both as <PRIZE>...</PRIZE>. 4) Cleaned up the garbled \"4√≤.\" format to \"4°.\" (quarto indicator)."}
